about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: It was three trumpets, Lonnie Hillyer, Hobart Dotson, and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: had Jimmy Bunn playing piano... and Hobart Dotson, one of fine trumpet players... Melba Liston was with the band... That's where I first met all of that gang
